name: store_returns_net_loss
description: Regressor that fits return net loss from return amount, tax, fee, and shipping cost.
comment: Structured monetary regression over store-return measures where the target is not passed as an input.

name: store_returns_return_amount
description: Three-input regressor that fits return amount from refunded cash, reversed charge, and store credit.
comment: Included as a structured arithmetic regression task over the main store return reimbursement components, which should strongly explain the recorded return amount.

name: store_returns_fee_band_classifier
description: Classifier that predicts a return-fee band directly from the fee amount.
comment: Included as a direct thresholding classifier where the target band is defined entirely by sr_fee, making it a clean sanity-check classification task.
target_expression: CASE WHEN sr_fee < 10 THEN 0 WHEN sr_fee < 25 THEN 1 WHEN sr_fee < 50 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
